message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-doctor-structs): pin CheckResult + 6 status structs wire format (resolves flywheel_connectors-jex6a)

22 tests complementing host_doctor_enums_conformance — pins the 7
status / result structs that compose DoctorReport.

- CheckpointStatus / RevocationStatus / AuditStatus: each carries
  freshness: FreshnessLevel; default = Fresh; freshness embeds as
  snake_case wire form
- TransportPolicyStatus: 3 booleans (allow_lan/allow_derp/allow_funnel),
  default all-false (fail-closed)
- StoreCoverageStatus::store_healthy default false (fail-safe)
- DegradedModeStatus::is_degraded default false
- CheckResult full 7-field contract: name (required), connector_id +
  code (skip-when-None + default-when-absent), status (required, embeds
  CheckStatus UPPERCASE), severity (required, embeds CheckSeverity
  lowercase), message (required), repair_hints (skip-when-empty +
  default-when-absent + order-preserving)
- Cross-struct sanity: 3 freshness-status defaults align with
  FreshnessLevel::default
- ZoneId field on doctor payloads round-trips canonical form

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
